doctor_turn: Hello, I’m Dr. Lee. What brought you in today?
patient_turn: Hi, um, I’ve been having this, like, really bad headache for the past two days. It’s, uh, continuous and feels like pressure in my forehead. I also have muscle aches and I’ve been feeling really tired… and I started coughing too.

doctor_turn: When did the headache first start?
patient_turn: It started, um, about two days ago. I think it was the morning after I started feeling, like, feverish and had chills. It’s just been, you know, pretty constant since then.

doctor_turn: How would you describe the location of your headache? Does it stay in one spot or spread anywhere?
patient_turn: Uh, it’s kind of in the front, I think? But it might, like, spread a little bit, maybe? I'm not totally sure.

doctor_turn: What does the headache feel like? Is it sharp, dull, or more like pressure?
patient_turn: It feels more like pressure, honestly. It’s not sharp or anything, just this constant, um, heavy feeling in my forehead. It’s really uncomfortable.

doctor_turn: When did the headache first start, and has it changed since then?
patient_turn: So, it started about two days ago, and, um, it hasn’t really changed much. It’s still that same pressure feeling, you know? Just hasn’t gone away, which is kinda worrying.

doctor_turn: Where exactly is the headache located? Is it just in the front, or does it spread anywhere else?
patient_turn: It’s mostly in the front, like, my forehead area, but sometimes I feel it a bit, um, around my temples too. It’s not really spreading anywhere else, just kind of, you know, concentrated there.

doctor_turn: What does the headache feel like? Is it sharp, dull, or more like pressure?
patient_turn: It’s definitely more like pressure, um, rather than sharp or dull. It’s just this constant, heavy feeling that doesn’t really go away, and it’s, like, really annoying.

doctor_turn: What makes the headache better or worse for you?
patient_turn: Well, it gets worse when I’m lying down, but I also think it’s better when I’m up and moving around. I’ve never really had headaches like this before, though.

doctor_turn: Does the headache ever spread to other areas, like your temples or the back of your head?
patient_turn: Um, not really to the back of my head, but I do feel it a bit around my temples sometimes. It’s mostly just that pressure in the front, but, you know, it can be a little distracting.

doctor_turn: Does the headache ever spread to other areas, like your neck or shoulders?
patient_turn: Well, the headache is mostly in the front, but sometimes it feels like it might spread a bit to my temples. Also, I’ve been feeling kind of achy all over, like my upper back and arms. Oh, and just yesterday, I was trying to help my son with his homework, and that was a bit stressful, so maybe that didn’t help either.

doctor_turn: Have you noticed any cough or other breathing issues along with the headache?
patient_turn: Yeah, I’ve had a dry cough that started the morning after the headache began. It’s, um, gotten worse since then, but I don’t have any breathing issues, like shortness of breath or anything. Just the cough and the headache, you know?

doctor_turn: Do you have any past medical conditions or are you taking any medications?
patient_turn: Um, yeah, I have type 2 diabetes, but it’s managed with metformin, and my blood sugar has been stable. I don’t take any other medications, and I’ve never had any surgeries or hospitalizations. So, um, that’s pretty much it.

doctor_turn: Do you have any allergies to medications?
patient_turn: No, I don’t have any known medication allergies. I’ve never had any issues with medications before, so, um, I think I’m good there.

doctor_turn: Does anyone in your family have any significant medical conditions?
patient_turn: Well, my son was recently diagnosed with asthma, and that’s, um, from my side of the family. Other than that, I don’t think there are any major conditions in my family. It’s just, you know, a bit concerning with everything going on.

doctor_turn: Can you tell me about your living situation and if you've had any recent exposures to illness?
patient_turn: Sure, I live with my spouse and son. Um, I haven’t traveled recently or had any known sick contacts at home or work. But, you know, I’m kinda worried about COVID-19 since I’ve been feeling unwell and there’s been a lot of exposure at my job.

doctor_turn: Have you been around anyone who was sick recently?
patient_turn: Um, not that I know of. I haven’t had any known sick contacts at home or work, but, you know, with everything going on, I’m just a bit anxious about it. I really hope it’s not anything serious.

doctor_turn: Are you feeling concerned about COVID-19, and have you had a test for it yet?
patient_turn: Yeah, I’m honestly pretty concerned about COVID-19, especially with how I’ve been feeling. I agreed to get tested, so I’m just waiting for the results now. It’s, um, really stressful, you know?
